1917        $styleKw = ['auto', 'balance', 'pretty', 'stable'];
1918        $components = $this->toComponents($value);
1919        if ($components === []) {
1920            return [];
1921        }
1922        $mode = null;
1923        $style = null;
1924        foreach ($components as $c) {
1925            if (!($c instanceof Keyword)) {
1926                continue;
1927            }
1928            $lc = strtolower($c->name);
1929            if ($mode === null && in_array($lc, $modeKw, true)) {
1930                $mode = $c;
1931                continue;
1932            }
1933            if ($style === null && in_array($lc, $styleKw, true)) {
1934                $style = $c;
1935            }
1936        }
1937        $out = [];
1938        if ($mode !== null) {
1939            $out['text-wrap-mode'] = $mode;
1940        }
1941        if ($style !== null) {
1942            $out['text-wrap-style'] = $style;
1943        }
1944        return $out;
1945    }
1946
1947    /**
1948     * Recognise a value that can serve as a mask source: a URL,
1949     * an image-set, a gradient (any typed Gradient subclass), or
1950     * the `none` keyword (which clears any earlier source).
1951     */
1952    private function looksLikeMaskImage(Value $v): bool
1953    {
1954        return $v instanceof \Phpdftk\Css\Value\Url
1955            || $v instanceof \Phpdftk\Css\Value\ImageSet
1956            || $v instanceof \Phpdftk\Css\Value\Gradient
1957            || ($v instanceof Keyword && strtolower($v->name) === 'none');
1958    }
1959
1960    /**
1961     * CSS Text Decoration 4 §8.6 — `text-emphasis` shorthand for
1962     * `text-emphasis-style` + `text-emphasis-color`. Components
1963     * may appear in any order; the color component is distinguished
1964     * by being a Color value (typed) or `currentcolor` keyword.
1965     *
1966     * @return array<string, Value>
1967     */
1968    private function expandTextEmphasis(Value $value): array
1969    {
1970        $components = $this->toComponents($value);
1971        if ($components === []) {
1972            return [];
1973        }
1974        $style = null;
1975        $color = null;
1976        foreach ($components as $c) {
1977            if ($color === null && $this->isColorComponent($c)) {
1978                $color = $c;
1979                continue;
1980            }
1981            $style ??= $c;
1982        }
1983        $out = [];
1984        if ($style !== null) {
1985            $out['text-emphasis-style'] = $style;
1986        }
1987        if ($color !== null) {
1988            $out['text-emphasis-color'] = $color;
1989        }
1990        return $out;
1991    }
1992
1993    private function isColorComponent(Value $v): bool
1994    {
1995        if ($v instanceof Color) {
1996            return true;
1997        }
1998        if ($v instanceof Keyword) {
1999            $lc = strtolower($v->name);
2000            return $lc === 'currentcolor' || $lc === 'transparent';
2001        }
2002        return false;
2003    }
2004
2005    private function looksLikeFontSize(Value $v): bool
2006    {
2007        if ($v instanceof Length || $v instanceof Percentage) {
2008            return true;
2009        }
2010        if ($v instanceof Keyword) {
2011            return in_array(strtolower($v->name), [
2012                'xx-small', 'x-small', 'small', 'medium', 'large', 'x-large', 'xx-large',
2013                'larger', 'smaller',
2014            ], true);
2015        }
2016        return false;
2017    }
2018
2019    /**
2020     * CSS Transitions 1 §3.2 — `transition` is per-property:
2021     *
2022     *   transition: <property> <duration> <timing-function> <delay>
2023     *
2024     * Components may appear in any order. The first time-valued
2025     * component sets `transition-duration`, the second sets
2026     * `transition-delay`; any easing keyword/function sets
2027     * `transition-timing-function`; any non-time, non-easing
2028     * non-keyword ident sets `transition-property` (or `all` as
2029     * default). Multiple comma-separated layers are supported —
2030     * each layer's longhands form a comma-joined list per spec.
2031     *
2032     * @return array<string, Value>
2033     */
2034    private function expandTransition(Value $value): array
2035    {
2036        $layers = $this->toCommaLayers($value);
2037        $properties = [];
2038        $durations = [];
2039        $timings = [];
2040        $delays = [];
2041        foreach ($layers as $layer) {
2042            $components = $this->toComponents($layer);
2043            $property = null;
2044            $duration = null;
2045            $timing = null;
2046            $delay = null;
2047            foreach ($components as $c) {
2048                if ($c instanceof \Phpdftk\Css\Value\Time) {
2049                    if ($duration === null) {
2050                        $duration = $c;
2051                    } elseif ($delay === null) {
2052                        $delay = $c;
2053                    }
2054                    continue;
2055                }
2056                if ($this->isEasingValue($c)) {
2057                    $timing ??= $c;
2058                    continue;
2059                }
2060                if ($c instanceof Keyword) {
2061                    $property ??= $c;
2062                }
2063            }
2064            $properties[] = $property ?? new Keyword('all');
2065            $durations[] = $duration ?? new Keyword('0s');
2066            $timings[] = $timing ?? new Keyword('ease');
2067            $delays[] = $delay ?? new Keyword('0s');
2068        }
2069        return [
2070            'transition-property' => $this->joinComma($properties),
2071            'transition-duration' => $this->joinComma($durations),
2072            'transition-timing-function' => $this->joinComma($timings),
2073            'transition-delay' => $this->joinComma($delays),
2074        ];
2075    }
2076
2077    /**
2078     * CSS Animations 1 §4.10 — `animation` is per-instance:
2079     *
2080     *   animation: <duration> <timing-function> <delay>
2081     *              <iteration-count> <direction> <fill-mode>
2082     *              <play-state> <name>
2083     *
2084     * Same any-order policy as `transition`: first time → duration,
2085     * second time → delay, easing → timing-function, number →
2086     * iteration-count, recognised keywords → direction / fill-mode /
2087     * play-state, remaining ident → name. Multi-layer (comma)
2088     * support.
2089     *
2090     * @return array<string, Value>
2091     */
2092    private function expandAnimation(Value $value): array
2093    {
2094        $layers = $this->toCommaLayers($value);
2095        $names = [];
2096        $durations = [];
2097        $timings = [];
2098        $delays = [];
2099        $iterations = [];
2100        $directions = [];
2101        $fillModes = [];
2102        $playStates = [];
2103        $directionKw = ['normal', 'reverse', 'alternate', 'alternate-reverse'];
2104        $fillModeKw = ['none', 'forwards', 'backwards', 'both'];
2105        $playStateKw = ['running', 'paused'];
2106        foreach ($layers as $layer) {
2107            $components = $this->toComponents($layer);
2108            $name = null;
2109            $duration = null;
2110            $timing = null;
2111            $delay = null;
2112            $iter = null;
2113            $direction = null;
2114            $fillMode = null;
2115            $playState = null;
2116            foreach ($components as $c) {
2117                if ($c instanceof \Phpdftk\Css\Value\Time) {
2118                    if ($duration === null) {
2119                        $duration = $c;
2120                    } elseif ($delay === null) {
2121                        $delay = $c;
2122                    }
2123                    continue;
2124                }
2125                if ($c instanceof \Phpdftk\Css\Value\Number
2126                    || $c instanceof \Phpdftk\Css\Value\Integer
2127                ) {
2128                    $iter ??= $c;
2129                    continue;
2130                }
2131                if ($c instanceof Keyword && strtolower($c->name) === 'infinite') {
2132                    $iter ??= $c;
2133                    continue;
2134                }
2135                if ($this->isEasingValue($c)) {
2136                    $timing ??= $c;
2137                    continue;
2138                }
2139                if ($c instanceof Keyword) {
2140                    $lc = strtolower($c->name);
2141                    if ($direction === null && in_array($lc, $directionKw, true)) {
2142                        $direction = $c;
2143                        continue;
2144                    }
2145                    if ($fillMode === null && in_array($lc, $fillModeKw, true)) {
2146                        $fillMode = $c;
2147                        continue;
2148                    }
2149                    if ($playState === null && in_array($lc, $playStateKw, true)) {
2150                        $playState = $c;
2151                        continue;
2152                    }
2153                    $name ??= $c;
2154                }
2155            }
2156            $names[] = $name ?? new Keyword('none');
2157            $durations[] = $duration ?? new Keyword('0s');
2158            $timings[] = $timing ?? new Keyword('ease');
2159            $delays[] = $delay ?? new Keyword('0s');
2160            $iterations[] = $iter ?? new \Phpdftk\Css\Value\Number(1);
2161            $directions[] = $direction ?? new Keyword('normal');
2162            $fillModes[] = $fillMode ?? new Keyword('none');
2163            $playStates[] = $playState ?? new Keyword('running');
2164        }
2165        return [
2166            'animation-name' => $this->joinComma($names),
2167            'animation-duration' => $this->joinComma($durations),
2168            'animation-timing-function' => $this->joinComma($timings),
2169            'animation-delay' => $this->joinComma($delays),
2170            'animation-iteration-count' => $this->joinComma($iterations),
2171            'animation-direction' => $this->joinComma($directions),
2172            'animation-fill-mode' => $this->joinComma($fillModes),
2173            'animation-play-state' => $this->joinComma($playStates),
2174        ];
2175    }
2176
2177    /**
2178     * Split a top-level comma list into per-layer values. A single
2179     * non-list value yields one layer.
2180     *
2181     * @return list<Value>
2182     */
2183    private function toCommaLayers(Value $value): array
2184    {
2185        if ($value instanceof \Phpdftk\Css\Value\ValueList
2186            && $value->separator === \Phpdftk\Css\Value\ListSeparator::Comma
2187        ) {
2188            return $value->values;
2189        }
2190        return [$value];
2191    }
2192
2193    /**
2194     * Join a list of per-layer longhand values into a comma-
2195     * separated ValueList (or pass through the single value).
2196     *
2197     * @param list<Value> $values
2198     */
2199    private function joinComma(array $values): Value
2200    {
2201        if (count($values) === 1) {
2202            return $values[0];
2203        }
2204        return new \Phpdftk\Css\Value\ValueList(
2205            $values,
2206            \Phpdftk\Css\Value\ListSeparator::Comma,
2207        );
2208    }
2209
2210    /**
2211     * Recognise easing forms — both the named keywords and the
2212     * typed function-value classes that the value parser lifts
2213     * from cubic-bezier() / steps() / linear().
2214     */
2215    private function isEasingValue(Value $v): bool
2216    {
2217        if ($v instanceof Keyword) {
2218            return in_array(strtolower($v->name), [
2219                'linear', 'ease', 'ease-in', 'ease-out', 'ease-in-out',
2220                'step-start', 'step-end',
2221            ], true);
2222        }
2223        if ($v instanceof \Phpdftk\Css\Value\CubicBezier
2224            || $v instanceof \Phpdftk\Css\Value\StepsEasing
2225            || $v instanceof \Phpdftk\Css\Value\LinearEasing
2226        ) {
2227            return true;
2228        }
2229        return false;
2230    }
2231}

Legend

Covered by small (and larger) testsCovered by medium (and large) testsCovered by large tests (and tests of unknown size)Not coveredNot coverable
